For iOS: No - Apple locks that down hard. You'd need:

TestFlight (requires $99/year dev account)
Or users jailbreak their phones (not practical)
Or enterprise certificates (also not practical)
So GitHub distribution = Android only.

PWA is still cleaner for cross-platform:

Host it on GitHub Pages (free)
Users visit the URL
Click "Add to Home Screen"
Works on both iOS and Android
No sideloading, no store fees, no platform restrictions
If you're cool with Android-only for now, Flutter + GitHub APKs works. But if you want iOS too without paying Apple, PWA is the only path.

### src/main.js
```js
import { AppStateManager } from './state/AppStateManager.js';
import { InputScreen } from './screens/InputScreen.js';
import { ReviewScreen } from './screens/ReviewScreen.js';
import { AnalysisScreen } from './screens/AnalysisScreen.js';

class App {
  constructor() {
    this.state = new AppStateManager();
    this.container = document.getElementById('app');
    this.currentScreen = null;
    
    this.init();
  }

  init() {
    // Register service worker
    if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
      navigator.serviceWorker.register('/service-worker.js');
    }

    // Listen for state changes
    this.state.subscribe(() => this.render());
    
    // Initial render
    this.render();
  }

  render() {
    const screen = this.state.getCurrentScreen();
    
    // Clear container
    this.container.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Render appropriate screen
    switch(screen) {
      case 'input':
        this.currentScreen = new InputScreen(this.state);
        break;
      case 'review':
        this.currentScreen = new ReviewScreen(this.state);
        break;
      case 'analysis':
        this.currentScreen = new AnalysisScreen(this.state);
        break;
    }
    
    this.container.appendChild(this.currentScreen.render());
  }
}

new App();
```

### src/state/AppStateManager.js
```js
export class AppStateManager {
  constructor() {
    this.state = {
      screen: 'input',
      userInput: '',
      generatedPrompt: null,
      selectedSection: null,
      isGenerating: false
    };
    this.listeners = [];
  }

  subscribe(listener) {
    this.listeners.push(listener);
  }

  notify() {
    this.listeners.forEach(listener => listener(this.state));
  }

  setState(updates) {
    this.state = { ...this.state, ...updates };
    this.notify();
  }

  getCurrentScreen() {
    return this.state.screen;
  }

  setScreen(screen) {
    this.setState({ screen });
  }
}
```

### src/screens/InputScreen.js
```js
export class InputScreen {
  constructor(stateManager) {
    this.state = stateManager;
  }

  render() {
    const container = document.createElement('div');
    container.className = 'screen input-screen';
    
    container.innerHTML = `
      
      Generate Prompt
    `;

    // Attach event listeners
    const textarea = container.querySelector('#user-input');
    const button = container.querySelector('#generate-btn');

    textarea.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
      this.state.setState({ userInput: e.target.value });
    });

    button.addEventListener('click', () => this.handleGenerate());

    return container;
  }

  async handleGenerate() {
    // Trigger AI generation
    this.state.setState({ isGenerating: true, screen: 'review' });
  }
}
```

### src/screens/ReviewScreen.js
```js
export class ReviewScreen {
  constructor(stateManager) {
    this.state = stateManager;
  }

  render() {
    const container = document.createElement('div');
    container.className = 'screen review-screen';
    
    container.innerHTML = `
      
        Generated prompt will appear here...
      
      
        Back
        Analyze
        Copy
      
    `;

    // Attach event listeners
    container.querySelector('#back-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      this.state.setScreen('input');
    });

    container.querySelector('#analyze-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      this.state.setScreen('analysis');
    });

    return container;
  }
}
```

### src/controllers/AIController.js
```js
import { AnthropicAPI } from '../services/AnthropicAPI.js';

export class AIController {
  constructor() {
    this.api = new AnthropicAPI();
  }

  async generatePrompt(userInput) {
    const systemPrompt = `You are a prompt engineering assistant...`;
    
    return await this.api.sendMessage(systemPrompt, userInput);
  }

  async refineSection(section, feedback) {
    // Handle section-level refinement
  }
}
```

### src/services/AnthropicAPI.js
```js
export class AnthropicAPI {
  constructor() {
    this.apiKey = import.meta.env.VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY;
    this.endpoint = 'https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages';
  }

  async sendMessage(systemPrompt, userMessage) {
    const response = await fetch(this.endpoint, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'x-api-key': this.apiKey,
        'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01'
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',
        max_tokens: 4096,
        system: systemPrompt,
        messages: [{ role: 'user', content: userMessage }]
      })
    });

    return await response.json();
  }
}
```

### Basic service-worker.js
```js
const CACHE_NAME = 'prompt-engine-v1';

self.addEventListener('install', (event) => {
  event.waitUntil(
    caches.open(CACHE_NAME).then((cache) => {
      return cache.addAll([
        '/',
        '/index.html',
        '/src/main.js',
        '/src/styles/main.css'
      ]);
    })
  );
});

self.addEventListener('fetch', (event) => {
  event.respondWith(
    caches.match(event.request).then((response) => {
      return response || fetch(event.request);
    })
  );
});
```

import { AppStateManager } from './state/AppStateManager.js';
import { InputScreen } from './screens/InputScreen.js';
import { ReviewScreen } from './screens/ReviewScreen.js';
import { AnalysisScreen } from './screens/AnalysisScreen.js';

class App {
  constructor() {
    this.state = new AppStateManager();
    this.container = document.getElementById('app');
    this.currentScreen = null;
    
    this.init();
  }

  init() {
    // Register service worker
    if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
      navigator.serviceWorker.register('/service-worker.js');
    }

    // Listen for state changes
    this.state.subscribe(() => this.render());
    
    // Initial render
    this.render();
  }

  render() {
    const screen = this.state.getCurrentScreen();
    
    // Clear container
    this.container.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Render appropriate screen
    switch(screen) {
      case 'input':
        this.currentScreen = new InputScreen(this.state);
        break;
      case 'review':
        this.currentScreen = new ReviewScreen(this.state);
        break;
      case 'analysis':
        this.currentScreen = new AnalysisScreen(this.state);
        break;
    }
    
    this.container.appendChild(this.currentScreen.render());
  }
}

new App();
```

### src/state/AppStateManager.js
```js
export class AppStateManager {
  constructor() {
    this.state = {
      screen: 'input',
      userInput: '',
      generatedPrompt: null,
      selectedSection: null,
      isGenerating: false
    };
    this.listeners = [];
  }

  subscribe(listener) {
    this.listeners.push(listener);
  }

  notify() {
    this.listeners.forEach(listener => listener(this.state));
  }

  setState(updates) {
    this.state = { ...this.state, ...updates };
    this.notify();
  }

  getCurrentScreen() {
    return this.state.screen;
  }

  setScreen(screen) {
    this.setState({ screen });
  }
}
```

### src/screens/InputScreen.js
```js
export class InputScreen {
  constructor(stateManager) {
    this.state = stateManager;
  }

  render() {
    const container = document.createElement('div');
    container.className = 'screen input-screen';
    
    container.innerHTML = `
      
      Generate Prompt
    `;

    // Attach event listeners
    const textarea = container.querySelector('#user-input');
    const button = container.querySelector('#generate-btn');

    textarea.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
      this.state.setState({ userInput: e.target.value });
    });

    button.addEventListener('click', () => this.handleGenerate());

    return container;
  }

  async handleGenerate() {
    // Trigger AI generation
    this.state.setState({ isGenerating: true, screen: 'review' });
  }
}
```

### src/screens/ReviewScreen.js
```js
export class ReviewScreen {
  constructor(stateManager) {
    this.state = stateManager;
  }

  render() {
    const container = document.createElement('div');
    container.className = 'screen review-screen';
    
    container.innerHTML = `
      
        Generated prompt will appear here...
      
      
        Back
        Analyze
        Copy
      
    `;

    // Attach event listeners
    container.querySelector('#back-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      this.state.setScreen('input');
    });

    container.querySelector('#analyze-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      this.state.setScreen('analysis');
    });

    return container;
  }
}
```

### src/controllers/AIController.js

    this.api = new AnthropicAPI();
  }

  async generatePrompt(userInput) {
    const systemPrompt = `You are a prompt engineering assistant...`;
    
    return await this.api.sendMessage(systemPrompt, userInput);
  }

    // Handle section-level refinement
  }
}
```

### src/services/AnthropicAPI.js
```js
export class AnthropicAPI {
  constructor() {
    this.apiKey = import.meta.env.VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY;
    this.endpoint = 'https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages';
  }

  async sendMessage(systemPrompt, userMessage) {
    const response = await fetch(this.endpoint, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'x-api-key': this.apiKey,
        'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01'
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',
        max_tokens: 4096,
        system: systemPrompt,
        messages: [{ role: 'user', content: userMessage }]
      })
    });

    return await response.json();
  }
}
```

### Basic service-worker.js
```js
const CACHE_NAME = 'prompt-engine-v1';

self.addEventListener('install', (event) => {
  event.waitUntil(
    caches.open(CACHE_NAME).then((cache) => {
      return cache.addAll([
        '/',
        '/index.html',
        '/src/main.js',
        '/src/styles/main.css'
      ]);
    })
  );
});

self.addEventListener('fetch', (event) => {
  event.respondWith(
    caches.match(event.request).then((response) => {
      return response || fetch(event.request);
    })
  );
});
```
